pi_items.source: Task description and verifier scripts (export_result.ps1 and verifier.py)
Task description and verifier.py role check
setup_task.ps1 script logic generating targeted failed logons
setup_task.ps1 script loop iterating exactly 15 times for user rwilliams
export_result.ps1 output path and verifier.py input path

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated failed logon events produced by setup_task.ps1. The expected new technician 'incident_handler' with the role 'Operator' and notification email 'security-alerts@corp.local' exactly matches the task instructions and evaluation scripts. The primary target account is verified as 'rwilliams' with exactly 15 failed logons generated during setup. The expected analysis report file is 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\brute_force_analysis.txt' and the automated evaluation result file is 'C:\Users\Docker\brute_force_response_result.json'.
